extraction.one_line_summary: JUNGELS Bob soloed to victory from 55km out on the descent of the third climb, holding off late pursuit from PINOT Thibaut and CASTROVIEJO Jonathan.
tactical_patterns: JUNGELS attacked on descent of third climb at 55km, not summit—descent timing negated chasers' climbing strength.
VAN AERT contested sprint at 200m yesterday then survived 21-rider breakaway today, revealing exceptional range/recovery.
POGAČAR gained 3 seconds on THOMAS Geraint in final sprint despite no GC pressure, banking margins opportunistically.

rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: positive: Won after multi-year drought, sprinted yesterday then soloed 55km today showing form transformation
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: Chased desperately from breakaway group but couldn't close on JUNGELS, lacks finishing punch
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Made 21-rider break day after stage win, extreme durability allows consecutive high-intensity efforts
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Lost 3 seconds to POGAČAR in finishing sprint, unable to follow GC rivals' accelerations
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Attacked for bonus seconds pre-rest day despite 39-second lead, aggressive margin-banking mentality
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: negative: Crashed early on flat roads before first climb, compromised breakaway opportunity on favorable stage
rider_signals.CASTROVIEJO Jonathan: positive: Second place from breakaway shows renewed form, can survive long-range moves
